title: Mature Content Hub (Safe, Age-Gated, Non-Explicit) — Frontend Plan

requirements.summary: Ensure the UI/UX and demo copy present a safe, non-explicit mature-audience platform with strict content rules and neutral examples.
acceptanceCriteria: The app contains no pornographic or sexually explicit images, videos, or text in seed/demo content.
UI copy and navigation avoid porn/explicit terminology; the app is presented as a mature-audience, non-explicit platform.
Any example content used for demos is neutral and non-explicit.

file_operations.description: Define non-explicit content rules, blocked-term list (kept minimal and non-graphic), and helper text used across the UI (labels, disclaimers, and error copy) to keep terminology mature-audience and non-explicit.

Create a mature-audience, non-explicit age confirmation screen with strict content rules summary and neutral wording; avoid explicit terminology. Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Card, Button, Checkbox/Separator) for consistent presentation. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create the browsing/feed page with neutral, non-explicit demo empty-states and UI copy. Use shadcn-ui components (Card, Button, Skeleton) for layout and loading states. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create the post detail view with neutral copy and safe rendering of description and optional external link (no auto-embedding). Use shadcn-ui components (Card, Button) for a polished layout. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create the post creation page with neutral labels and a short content-policy reminder; ensure all placeholder text is non-explicit. Use shadcn-ui components (Form primitives, Input, Textarea, Button, Alert) for accessible forms. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Add an age-gate flow that blocks access until 18+ confirmation and persists confirmation on device/session.
acceptanceCriteria: Visiting the app shows an age confirmation screen before any content pages are accessible.
After confirming, users can access the rest of the app without seeing the age gate again on refresh (until cleared).
Declining or failing to confirm keeps the user blocked from content pages.

file_operations.description: Implement age-gate state management using localStorage/sessionStorage (persist confirmed flag), plus helpers to confirm/clear and to check whether the user is gated.

Wire confirm/decline actions to useAgeGate; on confirm persist flag and navigate to the feed; on decline keep user blocked with clear messaging. Use shadcn-ui components for buttons/alerts. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create a guard wrapper that blocks rendering/navigating to content routes unless age confirmation is present; redirects to AgeGatePage when not confirmed.

Create a small frontend backend client wrapper around the existing backendInterface (from frontend/src/backend.d.ts) to call capabilities like ageGate, listPosts, getPost, createPost, deletePost from React code.
Add routing and navigation structure and ensure the AgeGateGuard is applied so no content routes render before age confirmation; ensure direct URL access to feed/detail/create is gated.

requirements.summary: Enable basic non-explicit content posting and browsing: create, list, view details, and delete the user’s own posts with timestamps and optional external link.
acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated users can create a post with title and description; the post appears in the global feed.
Users can open a post detail view from the feed.
Users can delete posts they created; they cannot delete others’ posts.
Posts show creation timestamps and render an optional external link when provided.

file_operations.description: Add React Query hooks for listing posts, fetching a post by id, creating posts, and deleting posts using the frontend backend client wrapper (frontend/src/backend.ts).

Render the global feed from usePosts list hook, show timestamps, and link each item to the detail view. Use shadcn-ui components (Card, Button, Skeleton) for consistent UI. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Fetch and render a single post with timestamp and optional external link; include a delete control that is only available for the author (as determined by authenticated principal in frontend state). Use shadcn-ui components (AlertDialog for delete confirm) for safe destructive actions. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Implement create form for title, description, optional external link URL; submit via create hook; handle success navigation back to feed and render validation errors. Use shadcn-ui form controls. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Register routes for feed, post detail, and create post, and ensure navigation links exist so these views are not orphaned.

requirements.summary: Require Internet Identity login to create or delete posts; allow anonymous browsing only after age gate.
acceptanceCriteria: Anonymous users can see the feed and post details only after age-gate confirmation.
Attempting to create or delete a post while not authenticated prompts the user to sign in with Internet Identity.
Authenticated state is reflected in the UI (e.g., sign in/out controls).

file_operations.description: Expose a small helper (or derived boolean) for "isAuthenticated" (non-anonymous principal) to simplify UI gating, while preserving existing login/clear behavior.

Create a header control showing sign in/out state and actions using useInternetIdentity; use shadcn-ui components (Button, DropdownMenu) to present controls. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create a lightweight wrapper to enforce authentication for specific actions/views (create/delete), triggering Internet Identity login when required and showing a friendly explanation.
Wrap the create form with RequireAuth so anonymous users are prompted to sign in before they can submit a post; keep browsing routes accessible after age gate.
Ensure delete action is protected: if not authenticated, prompt sign-in; if authenticated but not the author, hide/disable delete UI with clear messaging.
Add a shared layout/header that includes AuthControls and ensures the age gate still blocks access to content routes for all users until confirmed.

requirements.summary: Add client-side explicit-keyword filtering for titles/descriptions with clear rejection messaging (complementing backend enforcement).
acceptanceCriteria: Creating a post containing blocked explicit keywords is rejected in the UI with an explanatory error message.
The backend also rejects blocked explicit keywords so bypassing the UI cannot store prohibited content.
Rejected posts are not persisted and do not appear in the feed.

file_operations.description: Add keyword-based moderation helpers for validating title/description (case-insensitive matching, trimming, basic normalization) and return user-friendly, non-graphic error messages.

Run client-side policy validation before calling create; show a clear error message when blocked. Also handle backend rejection (e.g., surfaced error) and display the same policy-oriented message. Use shadcn-ui Alert component for errors. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Ensure create mutation surfaces backend errors in a consistent shape so UI can display a clear policy rejection message without leaking explicit terms.

requirements.summary: Apply a coherent, distinctive mature-audience theme across all views; avoid blue/purple primary palette.
acceptanceCriteria: A consistent theme is applied across the age gate, feed, post creation, and post detail views.
Primary palette is not blue/purple; typography and spacing are consistent and polished.

file_operations.description: Define the global design tokens/CSS variables used by Tailwind/shadcn (colors, radius, typography base) with a non-blue/purple primary palette (e.g., warm neutrals with amber/emerald accents) and consistent spacing defaults.
Adjust theme extensions as needed to support the new palette and consistent typography/spacing while keeping the existing Tailwind/shadcn variable-based approach.
Introduce a shared layout shell (header + content container) and apply consistent spacing/typography classes so the theme is uniform across AgeGatePage, FeedPage, CreatePostPage, and PostDetailPage.
